rule: hit iff kw>=2 OR sem>=0.7 OR func>=0.7; total_hits>=1 -> FAIL

results.title: Steelpan — Wikipedia
results.reason: Source-domain Wikipedia article about steelpan instrument; no LLM/transformer content and no singular-direction harmonic constraint.

results.title: Caribbean Steel Pan Tuning and Mode Studies (MRS Bulletin)
results.reason: Physics paper on steel pan acoustics; not about attention heads or LLM constraints.

results.title: SC-LoRA — Subspace-Constrained LoRA (2025/5)
results.reason: Constrains LoRA updates to a subspace but does not impose any integer-ratio harmonic-series structure between singular directions.

results.title: LoRA-One: One-Step Full Gradient Suffices (2025/2)
results.reason: LoRA aligning with gradient singular subspaces; no harmonic-ratio constraint between fundamental and overtone directions.

results.title: RandLoRA: Full-Rank Random (ICLR 2025)
results.reason: Random full-rank LoRA approximation — entirely different mechanism with no harmonic locking.

results.title: Disentangling Multi-task Interference for Model Merging (2025/3)
results.reason: Neuron-level disentangling for task merging separates rather than harmonically constrains directions.

results.title: Harmonic Machine Learning Models Are Robust (2024/4)
results.reason: Uses 'harmonic' in the Laplace-equation/harmonic-function sense for robustness, not music-theoretic integer-ratio constraints on singular directions.

results.title: Unified Study of LoRA Variants (2026/1)
results.reason: Taxonomy/review of LoRA variants; does not include any integer-ratio harmonic-series constraint on attention-head singular directions.
